climate.description: Mild spring conditions in central Portugal's coastal-influenced Leiria region.

fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 70. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 67.

course_description.character: Rolling road gran fondo through Leiria region's pine forests, medieval castle towns, and coastal plains, blending sustained climbs with technical descents in Serra de Sicó landscapes.
course_description.signature_challenge: The Serra de Sicó undulations combining 6500ft of climbing with fast, technical descents through central Portugal's karst terrain.
suffering_zones: Serra de Sicó Climbs: Key ascents in the limestone hills north of Pombal deliver the bulk of elevation gain amid scenic pine forests.
Coastal Time Trial: 20.5km out-and-back from Leiria to Praia do Pedrogão tests solo power on undulating seaside roads.
Pombal Fortress Finish: Final ramps into historic Pombal castle town after 93km of attrition for a dramatic mass sprint.

logistics.lodging_strategy: Pombal offers heritage hotels near castle; Leiria has vibrant options; nearby beaches like Praia do Pedrogão for coastal stays. Book early for March weekend.
logistics.transport: Two-day UCI qualifier: Time trial Sat March 28 in Leiria/Praia do Pedrogão; Granfondo Sun March 29 in Pombal. Packet pickup Fri-Sun at both sites. Aid stations, pasta party, electronic timing.

history.origin_story: Portugal's premier UCI Gran Fondo World Series qualifier, evolved from successful Granfondo Coimbra Region, relocated to Leiria/Pombal for 2026 with enhanced regional focus.

final_verdict.one_liner: UCI qualifier gem in Portugal's scenic heartland blending heritage, climbs, and coast.
